mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`users` (email, login_id, password, phone, user_type) VALUES (#{email}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{userType})
INSERT INTO `petlog`.`business_user` (user_id, company_name, representative_name, business_number) VALUES (#{userId}, #{dto.companyName}, #{dto.representativeName}, #{dto.businessNumber})

INSERT INTO `petlog`.`pets` (user_id, name, species, birth_date, gender, introduction, weight, body_type, image_url, is_primary) VALUES (#{userId}, #{pet.name}, #{pet.species}, #{pet.birthDate}, #{pet.gender}, #{pet.introduction}, #{pet.weight}, #{pet.bodyType}, #{pet.imageUrl}, #{pet.isPrimary})

INSERT INTO `petlog`.`address` (user_id, address_type, postal_code, address_primary, address_secondary, is_default) VALUES (#{userId}, #{address.addressType}, #{address.postalCode}, #{address.addressPrimary}, #{address.addressSecondary}, #{address.isDefault})
INSERT INTO `petlog`.`user_terms_agreement` (user_id, terms_id, agreed) VALUES (#{userId}, #{termsId}, TRUE)

INSERT INTO `petlog`.`store` (user_id, store_name, store_phone, postal_code, address_primary, address_secondary, category) VALUES (#{userId}, #{store.storeName}, #{store.storePhone}, #{store.postalCode}, #{store.addressPrimary}, #{store.addressSecondary}, #{store.category})
mapper.select: SELECT `user_id` AS userId, `name` AS name, `nickname` AS nickname FROM `petlog`.`personal_user` WHERE `nickname` = #{nickname} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS id, `email` AS email, `login_id` AS loginId, `password` AS password, `phone` AS phone, `user_type` AS userType, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`users` WHERE `login_id` = #{loginId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS id, `email` AS email, `login_id` AS loginId, `password` AS password, `phone` AS phone, `user_type` AS userType, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`users` WHERE `email` = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS id, `email` AS email, `login_id` AS loginId, `password` AS password, `phone` AS phone, `user_type` AS userType, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`users` WHERE `phone` = #{phone} LIMIT 1

SELECT `user_id` AS userId, `company_name` AS companyName, `representative_name` AS representativeName, `business_number` AS businessNumber FROM `petlog`.`business_user` WHERE `business_number` = #{businessId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS id, `email` AS email, `login_id` AS loginId, `password` AS password, `phone` AS phone, `user_type` AS userType, `created_at` AS createdAt FROM `petlog`.`users` WHERE `login_id` = #{loginId} AND `email` = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS id, `email` AS email, `login_id` AS loginId, `password` AS password, `phone` AS phone, `user_type` AS userType, `shop_point` AS shopPoint, `t1`.`created_at` AS createdAt, `user_id` AS userId, `name` AS name, `nickname` AS nickname FROM `petlog`.`users` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`personal_user` `t2` on `t1`.`id` = `t2`.`user_id` WHERE `t1`.`email` = #{email} AND `t2`.`name` = #{name} LIMIT 1

SELECT `id` AS id, `email` AS email, `login_id` AS loginId, `password` AS password, `phone` AS phone, `user_type` AS userType, `t1`.`created_at` AS createdAt, `user_id` AS userId, `company_name` AS companyName, `representative_name` AS representativeName, `business_number` AS businessNumber FROM `petlog`.`users` AS `t1` LEFT JOIN `petlog`.`business_user` `t2` on `t1`.`id` = `t2`.`user_id` WHERE `t1`.`email` = #{email} AND `t2`.`representative_name` = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT `user_id` AS userId, `name` AS name, `nickname` AS nickname FROM `petlog`.`personal_user` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT `user_id` AS userId, `company_name` AS companyName, `representative_name` AS representativeName, `business_number` AS businessNumber FROM `petlog`.`business_user` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} LIMIT 1
